data.title: Legal & General executives receive vested share awards under bonus plan
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

Legal & General ( (GB:LGEN) ) has issued an update.

Legal & General has disclosed the vesting of restricted share awards granted in April 2023 to several senior executives under its Share Bonus Plan, in line with UK Market Abuse Regulation requirements. The awards vested on 6 April 2026, with a portion of the resulting ordinary shares automatically sold on 7 April to settle tax liabilities and the balance retained by the individuals.

Group Chief Financial Officer Andrew Kail, retail and institutional business CEOs Laura Mason and Gareth Mee, Group Chief Risk Officer Chris Knight, and senior legal executives Geoffrey Timms and Maria Alvarez-Scott all saw sizeable awards vest. The transactions underline ongoing use of equity-based remuneration to align leadership incentives with shareholder interests, while the net increase in shares held by these PDMRs marginally strengthens management’s direct equity exposure in the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:LGEN) stock is a Hold with a £2.49 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Legal & General stock, see the GB:LGEN Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LGEN is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by weaker financial quality (margin compression, volatile cash generation, and higher leverage) and bearish technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). A very high dividend yield provides partial support but is offset by a relatively elevated P/E given recent profitability.

To see Spark’s full report on LGEN stock, click here.

More about Legal & General

Legal & General Group Plc is a UK-based financial services group focused on insurance, retirement solutions, investment management and savings products. Listed on the London Stock Exchange, it serves retail and institutional clients, with an emphasis on long-term savings, pensions, and asset management across the UK and international markets.

data.title: Trans Canada Gold Advances Harrison Lake Project With First Tranche Financing
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Trans Canada Gold ( (TSE:TTG) ) has issued an announcement.

Trans Canada Gold Corp. has closed the first tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising gross proceeds of $854,711 through the issuance of non-flow-through and flow-through units with accompanying warrants. The company also received exchange approval for its option agreement on the Harrison Lake Gold Property, marking a key step in consolidating its position in the district-scale gold project.

Proceeds will fund due diligence, acquisition payments, and a detailed first-year exploration program at Harrison Lake, including underground rehabilitation, drilling and infrastructure upgrades, with additional funds reserved for future work and working capital. If the full offering and over-allotment are completed, Trans Canada Gold could raise up to $2.3 million, strengthening its exploration budget and signaling continued institutional and insider support for advancing the property.

More about Trans Canada Gold

Trans Canada Gold Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in Canada. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and OTCQB, and is currently concentrating its efforts on advancing the Harrison Lake Gold Property in southwestern British Columbia.

Average Trading Volume: 89,750

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$7.18M

Denison Mines ( (TSE:DML) ) just unveiled an update.

Denison Mines Corp., a Canadian uranium miner and developer, is advancing its flagship Phoenix in-situ recovery uranium project in the Athabasca Basin while maintaining a portfolio of exploration assets and joint ventures that provide additional leverage to new uranium discoveries. The company reports a strong balance sheet and has positioned Phoenix as one of the few sizeable new uranium sources expected before the end of the decade, amid improving uranium and nuclear energy market fundamentals.

On April 8, 2026, Denison filed a Form 6-K announcing its 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders, scheduled for May 12, 2026 in Toronto, along with related materials delivered via a notice-and-access approach. Shareholders will receive the 2025 financial statements, vote on auditor reappointment, elect eight directors and consider an advisory say-on-pay resolution, while management highlights that regulatory approvals, detailed planning and contractor appointments in 2025 have paved the way to commence construction of the Phoenix ISR uranium mine in 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DML) stock is a Hold with a C$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Denison Mines stock, see the TSE:DML Stock Forecast page.

data.description:

North West ( (TSE:NWC) ) has shared an announcement.

North West reported essentially flat fourth-quarter sales at $675.5 million, modestly higher annual sales of $2.6 billion and a 1.9% rise in net earnings to $145.9 million, despite a challenging Canadian environment and tough comparisons to strong prior-year results. The company highlighted improved performance in its international segment, continued execution of its “Next 100” initiatives, a quarterly dividend of $0.41 per share and strategic investments including a new aircraft and hangar for North Star Air and an additional AC store in Utqiagvik, Alaska, reinforcing its balance-sheet strength and long-term growth focus.

Return on equity reached 18.2% and return on net assets was 17.1%, underscoring efficient capital deployment and profitability. Management noted that higher oil and fuel costs and softer Canadian demand remain headwinds, but the extended track record of sub-1.0 debt-to-equity and a decade-long dividend growth trend support the company’s positioning as a resilient operator in underserved markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NWC) stock is a Buy with a C$60.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on North West stock, see the TSE:NWC Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Saga Metals Orders High-Resolution Airborne Survey to Advance Labrador Critical Minerals Project
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Saga Metals Corp. ( (TSE:SAGA) ) has issued an update.

Saga Metals has hired Dias Airborne to carry out an advanced helicopter-borne geophysical survey over the full strike length of oxide layering that links the Trapper and Hawkeye zones at its Radar titanium-vanadium-iron project in Labrador. Using Dias’s QMAGT full tensor magnetic gradiometry system, the program will generate high-resolution magnetic data intended to refine geological models, support an upcoming mineral resource estimate for the Trapper zone and assess additional potential beyond areas already drilled.

The company has also released an updated summary of drilling results from its 2026 Trapper South campaign, which highlights substantial intercepts of semi-massive and rhythmically layered oxide mineralization in multiple holes. Together, the drilling data and the forthcoming survey are expected to sharpen Saga’s understanding of the scale and continuity of the oxide system, potentially enhancing the project’s resource definition and its strategic standing in the critical minerals sector.

More about Saga Metals Corp.

Saga Metals Corp. is a North American mineral exploration company focused on discovering critical minerals, with a core emphasis on titanium, vanadium and iron. The company’s flagship asset is the 100%-owned Radar Project near Cartwright in Labrador, Canada, where it targets oxide layering systems across zones such as Trapper and Hawkeye.

Average Trading Volume: 301,333

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$38.48M

PolyPeptide Group AG ( (CH:PPGN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Shareholders of PolyPeptide Group AG approved all board proposals at the company’s fifth ordinary Annual General Meeting, with 26,780,855 voting shares represented, or 80.85% of the issued share capital. The strong turnout underscores solid investor engagement as the company advances its role as a specialized CDMO in the peptide-based API market.

All six board members were re-elected, including Peter Wilden as chairman, and the existing compensation and nomination committee members were confirmed for another term. Investors also signed off on 2025 financial statements, non-financial reporting, compensation levels and discharge of directors and executives, signalling broad support for current governance and strategic direction ahead of the next AGM scheduled for 7 April 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:PPGN) stock is a Buy with a CHF40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PolyPeptide Group AG stock, see the CH:PPGN Stock Forecast page.

More about PolyPeptide Group AG

PolyPeptide Group AG is a specialized global contract development and manufacturing organization focused on peptide-based active pharmaceutical ingredients for pharma and biotech customers. Serving a rapidly growing market from preclinical to commercial stages, it targets therapeutic areas such as metabolic diseases, including GLP-1, through a global network of six GMP-certified sites in Europe, the U.S. and India, with shares listed on SIX Swiss Exchange.

data.title: First Atlantic Nickel Starts Drilling and Expands Access at Alloy Max Discovery
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ArcPacific Resources Corp ( (TSE:FAN) ) just unveiled an update.

First Atlantic Nickel Corp. has begun drilling at its new Alloy Max Zone, a large-scale awaruite nickel-cobalt alloy discovery located 7 km north of the RPM Zone within the Pipestone XL Nickel-Cobalt Alloy Project in central Newfoundland. The initial program comprises four drill holes across 2.4 km of strike and 950 m of width, following surface work that confirmed visible awaruite mineralization in bedrock and suggests Alloy Max could host a larger mineralized footprint than the existing RPM Zone.

The company has completed an access trail to Alloy Max and is starting construction of a drill access road extending north through Super Gulp toward Atlantic Lake, which will ultimately link the entire 30 km nickel trend to Grand Falls-Windsor and the Trans-Canada Highway. As road building progresses, First Atlantic plans systematic bedrock sampling via trenches and shallow pits along the corridor to test newly identified and historical DTR nickel anomalies, potentially unlocking additional nickel-cobalt alloy zones and materially enhancing the project’s exploration scalability and logistics.

More about ArcPacific Resources Corp

First Atlantic Nickel Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on nickel-cobalt alloy deposits within the 30 km Pipestone Ophiolite Complex in central Newfoundland. The company is advancing its Pipestone XL Nickel-Cobalt Alloy Project, targeting large-scale awaruite mineralization with district-wide surface sampling, drilling and related infrastructure development.

Average Trading Volume: 479,962

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$31.82M

data.description:

An update from Vesuvius ( (GB:VSVS) ) is now available.

Vesuvius has disclosed that chief executive Patrick André received 70,737 ordinary shares in the company following the vesting of a nil‑cost award under the 2023 Deferred Share Bonus Plan, including dividend equivalent shares. The transaction, conducted off‑market in London on 7 April, values the vested shares at about £279,623 based on an indicative price of £3.953.

In a related move, André sold 33,314 Vesuvius shares on the London Stock Exchange at £3.953 each, raising roughly £131,690 to cover tax withholdings linked to the vesting. The disclosure underscores ongoing alignment of executive pay with equity performance while signalling no change in underlying strategy or operations for shareholders and other stakeholders.

data.title: Rightmove Extends Long-Running Share Buyback With New 240,000-Share Purchase
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Rightmove ( (GB:RMV) ) is now available.

Rightmove plc has continued its long-running capital return strategy by repurchasing 240,000 of its 0.1p ordinary shares on 8 April 2026 at a volume-weighted average price of 443.024p, with the shares acquired via UBS AG London Branch. The company said the buyback represents 0.0317% of existing voting rights, will be fully cancelled, and is part of a programme under which it has now bought back a cumulative 551,382,729 shares, leaving 757,036,183 ordinary shares in issue and 10,635,168 held in treasury.

The latest transaction slightly reduces Rightmove’s free float and total voting rights, reinforcing a capital allocation policy focused on enhancing earnings per share and returning surplus cash to investors. By steadily shrinking its share count over many years, the group underlines confidence in its cash generation and business model, while offering incremental support to shareholder value in a competitive U.K. online property portal market.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RMV) stock is a Hold with a £455.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rightmove stock, see the GB:RMV Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RMV is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by outstanding financial performance (high margins, strong free cash flow, low leverage) and a supportive earnings outlook with continued capital returns. These positives are tempered by weak technical trends (below key longer-term moving averages with negative MACD) and only moderate valuation support (P/E ~15.9, ~2.27% yield).

To see Spark’s full report on RMV stock, click here.

data.title: Banco Macro Shareholders Approve AR$147 Billion Dividend Subject to Central Bank Nod
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Banco Macro SA ( (BMA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

At a shareholders’ meeting held on April 8, 2026, Banco Macro S.A. approved the separation of a portion of its optional reserve fund for future profit distributions to finance a dividend of AR$147.1 billion in constant February 28, 2026 currency, equivalent to AR$217.33 per share and subject to a 7% income tax withholding. The bank stressed that these are distributable profits from audited 2025 earnings, that the payout complies with the Central Bank’s Communiqué “A” 8410, and that, once BCRA authorization is obtained, the dividend will be paid in up to three equal, non-cumulative monthly installments starting in May, preserving regulatory commitments while returning capital to shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMA) stock is a Buy with a $118.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banco Macro SA stock, see the BMA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BMA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BMA is a Neutral.

Banco Macro’s overall stock score reflects a mix of strong revenue growth and a solid balance sheet, tempered by modest profitability and significant challenges highlighted in the recent earnings call. Technical indicators show positive momentum, but the financial performance and earnings call concerns weigh heavily on the score.

To see Spark’s full report on BMA stock, click here.

More about Banco Macro SA

Banco Macro S.A., also referred to as Macro Bank Inc., is an Argentine financial institution based in Buenos Aires that operates as a commercial bank. It provides a broad range of banking services, including lending, deposit-taking and other financial products, with a focus on the domestic market under the regulatory oversight of the Central Bank of the Argentine Republic.
